    D

    DatabaseConnection - Class in hr.java.financemanagementsystem.util
    Utility class for establishing a connection to the database.
    DataIntegrityException - Exception Class in hr.java.financemanagementsystem.exception
    Thrown when a database operation returns data in an inconsistent or unexpected state.

    delete(Category) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.CategoryDatabaseRepository
    Deletes a category from the database.

    Deletes a transaction from the database.

    Deletes a user from the database.

    Deletes an existing entity from the database.

    Called when the user clicks the delete account button.

    Deletes all categories belonging to a specific user.

    Deletes a category from the database.
    deleteTransaction(Transaction) - Static method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.service.TransactionService
    Deletes a transaction from the database.

    Deletes all transactions linked to a specific category.
    deleteTransactionsByCategory(Category) - Static method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.service.TransactionService
    Deletes all transactions linked to a specific category.
    deleteTransactionsByUser(User) - Method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.database.TransactionDatabaseRepository
    Deletes all transactions belonging to a specific user.
    deleteUserAccount() - Static method in class hr.java.financemanagementsystem.service.UserService
    Permanently deletes the logged in user's account.
